reforms.description: A new venture capital company was established, jointly owned by the central government (49 per cent) and the private sector (51 per cent), aimed at supporting innovative firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a venture capital company is expected to enhance funding opportunities for startups, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The new venture capital company was established as part of the 1989 Budget.
reforms.importance_rationale: The creation of a joint venture capital company represents a significant structural change in the funding landscape for innovative firms, potentially leading to increased investment in research and development.
reforms.source_quote: A new venture capital company was established, jointly owned by the central government (49 per cent) and the private sector (51 per cent).
